personalInfo.name: Milind Murmu
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Developer
personalInfo.bio: Passionate developer with expertise in building modern web applications. I love creating elegant solutions to complex problems and turning ideas into reality through code.

1.description: Developing enterprise-level applications and contributing to modern web solutions using cutting-edge technologies.

roles.title: Specialist Programmer
roles.description: Leading frontend architecture and contributing to enterprise-level web solutions.
highlightPoints: Architected micro-frontend module system for scalable apps
Mentored junior developers on React and TypeScript best practices
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on full-stack development

roles.title: Specialist Programmer Intern
roles.description: Contributed to web application development while completing intensive training program.
highlightPoints: Built reusable UI components using React and TypeScript
Completed full-stack development training with top performance
Implemented responsive UI features for enterprise clients
